parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the distortion. Lower values are darker and higher values are brighter.
parameters-en.Peak Type: Low is more transparent, and better for a clean boost. High has more distortion, volume, and exhibits a slight bump in the midrange.
parameters-en.Version: Selects which version of the original pedal to emulate--V2 or V4. V4 has a slight upper mid boost and a bit more sustain.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the output level of the distortion.
